# GitHub Copilot Coding Agent Instructions

Use these files first:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `README.md`
- `docs/README.md`

If outbound HTTPS is allowed, optional intake is described in `agent-intake.json`.

Common validation:

- `cd desktop && npm test`
- `cd desktop && npm run build`
- `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
